SPIRE1REVAMPED-ASCEND.title: Ascend
SPIRE1REVAMPED-ACCRETION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-ACCRETION.title: Accretion
SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY.description:
Every 2 times you lose HP, draw 1 card.
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY.title: Brutality
SPIRE1REVAMPED-CONCENTRATE.description:
Discard 2 cards and transform them into [gold]Shivs[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to their costs.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
SPIRE1REVAMPED-CRIPPLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-CRIPPLE.title: Cripple
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM.description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, ALL enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM.title: Disarm
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FIREWALL.title: Firewall
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FLYING_KNEE.title: Flying Knee
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FROM_THE_AETHER.descripti: Whenever you create a card, draw 1 card.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FROM_THE_AETHER.title: From the Aether
SPIRE1REVAMPED-GALVANIZE.title: Galvanize
SPIRE1REVAMPED-GRIM_REAPER.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals {OstyDamage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Osty[/gold] heals HP equal to damage dealt.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-GRIM_REAPER.title: Grim Reaper
SPIRE1REVAMPED-INVIGORATE.description: At the end of your turn, gain {InvigoratePower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SPIRE1REVAMPED-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
SPIRE1REVAMPED-KEEPER.description:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}, plus an additional {CalculationExtra:diff()} for every {BlockThreshold:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] you have.{InCombat:
([gold]Summon[/gold] {CalculatedDisplaySummon:diff()})|}
SPIRE1REVAMPED-KEEPER.title: Keeper
SPIRE1REVAMPED-OSSIFY.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Summon[/gold] from cards is increased by [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SPIRE1REVAMPED-OSSIFY.title: Ossify
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PAIN.description: While in hand, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP whenever other cards are played.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PAIN.title: Pain
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PREIGNITE.description: Play 1 of the top {Cards:diff()} cards of your Draw Pile and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the rest.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PREIGNITE.title: Preignite
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PULSE_OF_LIFE.description: Whenever you play a card, [gold]Osty[/gold] heals {PulseOfLifePower:diff()} HP.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PULSE_OF_LIFE.title: Pulse of Life
SPIRE1REVAMPED-RAVAGE.title: Ravage
SPIRE1REVAMPED-REDUPLICATE.title: Reduplicate
SPIRE1REVAMPED-RECURSION.description:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] your rightmost Orb.
[gold]Channel[/gold] that same Orb.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-RECURSION.title: Recursion
SPIRE1REVAMPED-ROGUE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Discard 1 card.
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-ROGUE.title: Rogue
